metadata.title: Quick Prompt - Save, reuse, and share AI prompts instantly
metadata.description: The fastest way to manage prompts for ChatGPT, Claude, and AI tools. Built for developers, marketers, and prompt engineers to boost productivity.

home.badge: Quick Prompt v2.0 is now live
home.title: Save, reuse, and share AI prompts instantly
home.description: The fastest way to manage prompts for ChatGPT, Claude, and AI tools. Built for developers, marketers, and prompt engineers to boost productivity.

features.title: Everything you need for prompt engineering
features.subtitle: A complete toolkit designed for high-efficiency AI workflows.

saveInstantly.title: Save instantly
saveInstantly.description: Capture prompts from any website with a single click using our browser extension.

insertOneClick.title: Insert in one click
insertOneClick.description: Access your prompt library directly inside ChatGPT, Claude, and other AI tools.

organize.title: Organize & Tag
organize.description: Keep your prompts structured with folders, tags, and powerful search capabilities.

share.title: Share with a link
share.description: Generate public links for your best prompts to share with your team or the community.

step1.title: Save prompt
step1.description: Highlight any text and hit Cmd+Shift+S to save it to your library instantly.

step2.title: Reuse instantly
step2.description: Type '/' in any AI chat interface to bring up your prompt library and insert.

step3.title: Share with friends
step3.description: Click 'Share' to get a public link that anyone can view and copy from.

cta.title: Ready to supercharge your AI workflow?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of developers and marketers who use Quick Prompt every day.

prompts.title: Explore AI Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Discover the best prompts created by the community.

blog.title: The Quick Prompt Blog
blog.subtitle: Insights, tutorials, and updates from the team building the fastest prompt management tool.

footer.description: The fastest way to manage prompts for ChatGPT, Claude, and AI tools.
